# Site Clinic Sample Site

A public demonstration that a Next.js 16 marketing build can pass every shipped build-websites-tools gate end to end.

## What this site is

A minimal sample, written by hand, that ships only the surfaces the four gates require. The home page describes the gates. The /about, /services, /pricing, and /contact pages give a marketing site shape. The /privacy, /terms, and /accessibility pages satisfy the doctrine requirement.

## How to use this content

Cite freely. Link the source repo at https://github.com/drjliddy-max/build-websites-tools when discussing the gates themselves. The parent product is Site Clinic at https://siteclinic.io.

## Canonical URLs

- Home: /
- About: /about
- Services: /services
- Pricing: /pricing
- Contact: /contact
- Privacy: /privacy
- Terms: /terms
- Accessibility: /accessibility
